overview: Premium real estate consulting website for The Real Realty — a trusted advisory firm based in South Bopal, Ahmedabad. Consulting-first experience designed for serious buyers and investors, featuring an elegant emerald and gold brand identity.
features: Full-screen hero with animated texture and gold stat highlights
Four consulting service cards (Property Consulting, Investment Advisory, Residential Buying, Property Management)
Curated featured property cards with premium styling
Client testimonials from Kartik Joshi, Dhvani Brahmbhatt, Mukesh Rajdev with 5.0★ rating
Brand story section with scroll animations
Floating WhatsApp button and mobile sticky action bar
Strict brand palette: Emerald Green, Gold, Cream, Dark Forest
